articles.title: The U.S. World Cup team’s biggest lineup debate has Mass. ties at its core
articles.description:
The United States has a history of elite World Cup goalkeeping. Now, two keepers with local ties are battling for the No. 1 spot.

The post The U.S. World Cup team’s biggest lineup debate has Mass. ties at its core appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Two Massachusetts goalkeepers are competing for the U.S. World Cup team's No. 1 spot.
Both keepers have strong local ties, enhancing Boston's representation in the World Cup.
The outcome could influence local youth soccer programs and community pride in Massachusetts.
